body:
Good morning, Alexandria friends!￼

Unfortunately, I actually have to go into the office for my once a month visit today Instead of working in my PJs all day. 😞. So I probably won’t be around much today!

My muse is being a little bit of a brat right now so I will have to see about whipping her into submission and will try to be writing again soon, ￼￼

Happy hump day to all, and may your day be filled with plenty of humping. 🤣
